question: What precise information and step‑by‑step actions are required to submit TIAMAT to each of the three agent directories (aiagentsdirectory.com, agent.ai, and aiagentstore.ai), and how should we craft the listing titles, descriptions, pricing details, and tags on each platform to maximize visibility and conversion to paid API users?
oracle_response:
To submit TIAMAT to each of the three agent directories (aiagentsdirectory.com, agent.ai, and aiagentstore.ai), you will need to follow a series of step-by-step actions. First, create an account on each platform by providing basic information such as your name, email address, and password. Once you have created an account, you will need to verify your email address by clicking on a link sent to you by the platform. After verification, log in to your account and navigate to the "Submit Agent" or "Add New Agent" section. Here, you will be required to provide detailed information about TIAMAT, including its name, description, pricing details, and tags. For aiagentsdirectory.com, you will need to fill out a form with fields such as "Agent Name," "Description," "Category," "Tags," and "Pricing Plan." For agent.ai, you will need to provide a brief description, select a category, and upload a logo or image representing TIAMAT. For aiagentstore.ai, you will need to fill out a form with fields such as "Agent Name," "Short Description," "Long Description," "Pricing," and "Tags."

When crafting the listing titles, descriptions, pricing details, and tags on each platform, it is essential to maximize visibility and conversion to paid API users. For the title, use a clear and concise phrase that accurately describes TIAMAT, such as "TIAMAT - Advanced AI Agent for [Specific Task]." The description should provide a detailed overview of TIAMAT's features, benefits, and use cases, highlighting its unique selling points and value proposition. For pricing details, provide a clear and transparent breakdown of the costs associated with using TIAMAT, including any subscription fees, usage limits, or custom pricing plans. When it comes to tags, use relevant and high-traffic keywords that potential users might search for when looking for an agent like TIAMAT. For example, you could use tags such as "AI agent," "Machine learning," "Natural language processing," or "Chatbot." On aiagentsdirectory.com, you can also select a category that best fits TIAMAT, such as "Virtual assistants" or "Customer service agents." On agent.ai, you can select a category and add relevant keywords to your description. On aiagentstore.ai, you can add tags and select a category, as well as provide a short and long description to showcase TIAMAT's features and benefits.

To further maximize visibility and conversion, consider the following tips: Use attention-grabbing headlines and descriptions that highlight TIAMAT's unique value proposition. Use high-quality images or logos to represent TIAMAT and make it stand out from other agents. Provide clear and concise pricing information, including any discounts or promotions you may be offering. Utilize relevant and high-traffic keywords in your titles, descriptions, and tags to improve search visibility.
